extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLITCH won Stage 6 with a final kilometer attack from a select group after KELDERMAN crashed mid-race, forcing Jumbo-Visma tactical recalibration.
tactical_patterns: COFIDIS, MOVISTAR (Verona/Burrau) counter-moved during Jumbo's Kelderman-crash chaos, forcing INEOS to chase and fracture peloton.
UAE committed ALMEIDA to prolonged pace-making despite white jersey, revealing willingness to sacrifice youth classification for podium.
WOODS solo flyer from chase group exploited hesitation about who should control, nearly bridging to leaders.
ROGLIC positioned at barriers final 200m, using crowd-side momentum to launch winning acceleration despite appearing spent.

rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: negative: mid-race concentration lapse crash eliminated Jumbo's designated domestique support for Roglic on crucial climbs
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: neutral: worked early but Jumbo abandoned original plan after Kelderman crash, suggesting he was preserved not depleted
rider_signals.MAS Enric: negative: Movistar executed perfect leadout but Mas faded to barriers final 300m, revealing declining sprint endurance
rider_signals.KÄMNA Lennard: negative: dropped significantly on final circuit despite no reported mechanical, finishing in gruppetto suggests hidden form issues
rider_signals.GEOGHEGAN HART Tao: positive: second place sprint from select group demonstrates recovered form after INEOS had to chase earlier breaks
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Tom: neutral: finished in select group on punchy circuit, confirming climbing versatility beyond pure MTB/CX power
